name: Espnow → Broadcast
description: This is an [Action](https://esphome.io/automations/actions#all-actions) for sending a data packet over the espnow protocol to any device that is listening.

config_entries.label: Address
config_entries.description: The MAC address of the receiving device to send to.

config_entries.label: Continue On Error
config_entries.description: If set to `false`, the next action will not be triggered if the data could not be sent. Defaults to `true`.

config_entries.label: Wait For Sent
config_entries.description: The automation will wait for the data to be sent and for the `on_sent` or `on_error` actions to be finished before continuing with the next action. Defaults to `true`.
